creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-03-07 15:51:44 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    irc                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    irc/znc              Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  ZNC is an advanced IRC bouncer with features that include support for
  multiple users, playback buffers, DCC bouncing, SASL authentication
  and SSL encryption. It can be extended with dynamically loaded modules
  written in C++ or Perl.
  
  WWW: http://znc.in/
  
      PR:         ports/121412
  Submitted by:   elvstone at gmail.com
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.160     +1 -0      ports/irc/Makefile
  1.1       +61 -0     ports/irc/znc/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/irc/znc/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/irc/znc/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +136 -0    ports/irc/znc/pkg-plist (new)
